fullText:
Ejderha Uçuşu is a roller coaster manufactured by Zierer, its model being Force 190, located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey.

Red track with green supports.




 * Photograph of the front of the train on Facebook
 * Photograph of the track layout on Facebook
